items.title: Adult store receives order from US Department of War to stop sending butt plugs to the navy

items.title: 'Burned and destroyed': Locals and tourists describe Mexico unrest
items.dek: Violence has erupted across several states in Mexico after cartel leader El Mencho was killed on Sunday.
items.body: Violence has erupted across several states in Mexico after cartel leader El Mencho was killed on Sunday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mexico sends thousands of soldiers to stop violence after death of drug lord
items.dek: A wave of violence has erupted across Mexico since a powerful drug cartel boss died following his capture by special forces.
items.body: A wave of violence has erupted across Mexico since a powerful drug cartel boss died following his capture by special forces.
items.author: IriLine Desk
